name: Tom Ranier
abstract: Thomas John Ranier (born July 13, 1949) is an American instrumentalist who primarily plays piano but also saxophone and clarinet. As a jazz artist he has recorded widely under his own name and as a sideman for Warner Bros., Concord Records and several other labels.

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Gibbs
about_quotes.evidence: All the guys who played for me in California, they were great. Tom Ranier, he’s on the academy award show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Gibbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 5, 2021 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: DeFranco Buddy
about_quotes.evidence: I befriended a great musician, Tom Ranier in California... And we played together a lot
about_quotes.doc_title: DeFranco Buddy — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
